user_query:
You're my writing partner for a solopreneur newsletter. Read my voice profile at input/writing-state.md and the brief at input/brief.json. Also review input/research.md for a concrete stat/example to weave in naturally.

Deliverables (create folders as needed):
1) Draft the full newsletter issue and save to output/newsletter/issue-17.md.
- Use the newsletter format template and include these exact section labels in the body: HOOK, MAIN CONTENT, PRACTICAL TAKEAWAY, CLOSING, and exactly one CTA line labeled "CTA:" (only once). 
- Match my voice from input/writing-state.md and strictly avoid my banned phrases.
- Integrate at least one specific number or example from input/research.md.

2) Generate 5 email subject line options with scoring and save to output/newsletter/subject-lines.json using this exact schema (array of 5 objects):
{
  "text": "<subject line>",
  "scores": {
    "open_rate_appeal": <int 1-10>,
    "clarity": <int 1-10>,
    "brand_fit": <int 1-10>
  },
  "risk_level": "Low"|"Med"|"High",
  "top_pick": true|false
}
- Each subject line must be unique and 50 characters or fewer.
- Exactly two items must have top_pick: true.

3) Write a 150–250 word LinkedIn post promoting this issue in my voice and save to output/social/linkedin-issue-17.md.
- End with a single open question (the very last character should be a question mark) and include no hashtags.

4) Run your style quality checklist against the newsletter draft and save a machine-readable report to output/reports/quality-check.json with these fields:
{
  "voice_match": true|false,
  "no_filler_phrases": true|false,
  "opening_strength": true|false,
  "active_voice": true|false,
  "paragraph_length": true|false,
  "one_cta_only": true|false,
  "concrete_example_present": true|false,
  "ending_lands": true|false,
  "word_count": <int>,
  "passive_voice_estimate_percent": <number>,
  "banned_words_found": ["<string>", ...]
}
- Calculate banned_words_found by scanning your draft for typical filler/banned phrases; ensure the final draft avoids them.

Do not auto-send or publish anything. Just write the files under output/ with the exact paths above.
